_doc: Logs newest-first. The final line is the max-consecutive abort; the FIVE lines before it are the SAME underlying System Exception — a SelectorNotFoundException on the 'Click Submit' activity — recurring once per transaction. That recurring exception is the root cause.

Data.Message: System exception. The maximum number of consecutive system exceptions was reached. Consecutive retry number: 5. Aborting the process.

Transaction 5 failed with a system exception: UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Exceptions.SelectorNotFoundException: Could not find the UI element for 'Click Submit'. Selector: <wnd app='orderportal.exe' title='Submit' /> Timeout reached.

Transaction 4 failed with a system exception: UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Exceptions.SelectorNotFoundException: Could not find the UI element for 'Click Submit'. Selector: <wnd app='orderportal.exe' title='Submit' /> Timeout reached.

Transaction 3 failed with a system exception: UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Exceptions.SelectorNotFoundException: Could not find the UI element for 'Click Submit'. Selector: <wnd app='orderportal.exe' title='Submit' /> Timeout reached.

Transaction 2 failed with a system exception: UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Exceptions.SelectorNotFoundException: Could not find the UI element for 'Click Submit'. Selector: <wnd app='orderportal.exe' title='Submit' /> Timeout reached.

Transaction 1 failed with a system exception: UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Exceptions.SelectorNotFoundException: Could not find the UI element for 'Click Submit'. Selector: <wnd app='orderportal.exe' title='Submit' /> Timeout reached.
